diagrams.title: Waterfall Model
diagrams.description: Sequential linear model showing phases flowing downward like a waterfall
diagrams.purpose: Understand the rigid, phase-based approach where each phase completes before the next begins

diagrams.title: V-Model
diagrams.description: Development phases on left slope, corresponding testing phases on right slope forming a V shape
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how testing activities correspond to development phases for early defect detection

diagrams.title: Spiral Model
diagrams.description: Spiral diagram with 4 quadrants in each cycle: Plan, Risk Analysis, Engineering, Evaluation
diagrams.purpose: Understand iterative risk-driven approach with growing project complexity

diagrams.title: Scrum Process Flow
diagrams.description: Circular diagram showing sprint cycle with ceremonies and artifacts
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the iterative nature of Scrum with time-boxed events and deliverables

diagrams.title: DevOps Pipeline
diagrams.description: Pipeline showing CI/CD stages from code commit to production deployment
elements: Code Commit → Build → Unit Test → Integration Test → Staging → Production → Monitor
diagrams.purpose: Understand automated delivery pipeline and continuous improvement cycle

visuals.title: Methods And Methodologies
visuals.description: Visual diagram for methods and methodologies
